creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
I can confirm that this happens with the pre-build packages for 14-, and that locally-build packages for 13- do not exhibit this problem. I suspect the difference is in (base?) ZLIB, though, not in the ports themselves. Well, maybe that means that CMake's tooling for spitting out dependency information is broken, or perhaps these ports have built something derpy themselves.

It will take a bunch of rebuilds, though :S
